title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National 1[ Institutes] of Pharmaceutical Education and Research Act, 1998. (2) It shall come into force on such date2 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022). 2. 8th July, 1998, vide notification No. S.O. 1412(E), dated 7th July, 1998, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
